name: Quick Open File
description: Opens a fuzzy-search dialog to quickly navigate to any file in the workspace by typing part of its name.

name: Command Palette
description: Opens the Command Palette to search and execute any VS Code command by name.

name: Open Settings
description: Opens the Settings UI where preferences and configuration options can be searched and modified.

name: Toggle Sidebar
description: Shows or hides the primary sidebar (Explorer, Source Control, Extensions, etc.).

name: Toggle Terminal
description: Shows or hides the integrated terminal panel.

name: New File
description: Creates a new untitled file in the editor.

name: Save
description: Saves the currently active file to disk.

name: Save All
description: Saves all open and modified files at once.

name: Close Editor
description: Closes the currently active editor tab.

name: Close All Editors
description: Closes all open editor tabs simultaneously.

name: Split Editor
description: Splits the current editor into two panels side by side.

name: Focus Next Editor Group
description: Moves focus to the next editor group when the editor is split into multiple panels.

name: Go to Line
description: Opens a prompt to jump directly to a specific line number in the current file.

name: Go to Symbol
description: Opens a fuzzy-search list of symbols (functions, classes, variables) in the current file for quick navigation.

name: Find
description: Opens the in-file search widget to find text in the current document.

name: Replace
description: Opens the in-file search and replace widget to find and substitute text in the current document.

name: Find in Files
description: Opens the global Search panel to find text across all files in the workspace.

name: Select All Occurrences
description: Selects all instances of the currently selected text in the file, creating multiple cursors for simultaneous editing.

name: Add Cursor at Click
description: Adds an additional cursor at the clicked position, enabling multi-cursor editing at arbitrary locations.

name: Add Cursor Below
description: Inserts an additional cursor on the line below the current cursor position.

name: Add Cursor Above
description: Inserts an additional cursor on the line above the current cursor position.

name: Move Line Down
description: Moves the current line (or selection) down by one line.

name: Move Line Up
description: Moves the current line (or selection) up by one line.

name: Copy Line Down
description: Duplicates the current line and inserts the copy immediately below.

name: Copy Line Up
description: Duplicates the current line and inserts the copy immediately above.

name: Delete Line
description: Deletes the entire current line without leaving a blank line.

name: Toggle Line Comment
description: Toggles single-line comments on the current line or selected lines using the language-appropriate comment syntax.

name: Toggle Block Comment
description: Wraps or unwraps the selection in a block comment using the language-appropriate block comment syntax.

name: Format Document
description: Runs the configured formatter on the entire active document to apply consistent code style.

name: Rename Symbol
description: Renames the symbol under the cursor across all references in the workspace using language server intelligence.

name: Go to Definition
description: Navigates to the definition of the symbol under the cursor, jumping to the source file and line where it is declared.

name: Peek Definition
description: Shows the definition of the symbol under the cursor inline in a peek widget without leaving the current file.

name: Show References
description: Finds and lists all references to the symbol under the cursor across the workspace.

name: Quick Fix
description: Opens the Quick Fix menu with suggested code actions, refactors, and automated fixes for the current error or warning.

name: Toggle Breakpoint
description: Adds or removes a debug breakpoint on the current line.

name: Start Debugging
description: Starts a debug session using the active launch configuration, or continues execution when paused at a breakpoint.

name: Step Over
description: Executes the next line of code during a debug session without stepping into function calls.

name: Step Into
description: Steps into the function call on the current line during a debug session to inspect its execution.

name: Toggle Word Wrap
description: Toggles soft word wrap in the editor so long lines either wrap to the viewport width or extend horizontally.

name: Increase Font Size
description: Increases the editor font size by one step.

name: Decrease Font Size
description: Decreases the editor font size by one step.

name: Zen Mode
description: Toggles Zen Mode, hiding all UI chrome for a distraction-free full-screen editing experience.

name: Source Control
description: Opens the Source Control panel in the sidebar to stage, commit, and manage Git changes.

name: Extensions
description: Opens the Extensions panel to search, install, enable, and disable VS Code extensions.

name: Explorer
description: Opens the Explorer panel in the sidebar to browse files and folders in the workspace.

name: Emmet Wrap with Abbreviation
description: Opens the Emmet Wrap with Abbreviation prompt to wrap selected HTML content in an Emmet-generated element.

name: Fold Region
description: Collapses the innermost foldable region (block, function, or structure) at the current cursor position.

name: Unfold Region
description: Expands the innermost collapsed region at the current cursor position.

name: Select to End of Line
description: Extends the selection from the current cursor position to the end of the line.

name: New Terminal
description: Creates a new integrated terminal instance in the terminal panel.
